skills.name: read-blog
skills.description: Read blog posts by Elian Van Cutsem in markdown format. Send a request with Accept: text/markdown to any blog post URL to receive the raw markdown content.

skills.name: site-overview
skills.description: Machine-readable overview of Elian Van Cutsem's site. Available at /llms.txt (summary) and /llms-full.txt (extended).
